overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, stormy forest at night. The character follows a winding dirt path through dense woodland, passing a large dead monster with glowing wounds before continuing into increasingly dense and dark forest terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with grassy hillsides

events.description: large dead monster with glowing pink wounds becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, approaching and passing a fallen creature on the left

entered.detail: tall pine trees lining the left side of the path
tall pine trees lining the right side of the path
grass-covered rocky hillside with sparse vegetation
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
large dead creature with glowing pink wounds lying beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Geralt walking along an open forest trail during a stormy night. Tall trees line both sides of the dirt path while grassy hillsides are visible to the right. Around the 32-second mark, a large dead monster with glowing wounds comes into view on the left side of the path, which the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest with thick canopy coverage

events.description: entering denser forest area with thicker tree coverage and darker atmosphere

agents.ego_description: continuing deeper into the dark forest, navigating through denser tree coverage

entered.detail: thick overhead tree canopy blocking most of the sky

segments.scene_description: After passing the creature, the scene transitions to a denser, more enclosed forest area. The tree canopy becomes thicker, blocking most of the sky and creating a darker atmosphere. The path continues winding through closely spaced trees as the character moves deeper into the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy forest that shifts from an open trail into a dense, oppressive woodland. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined with tall trees and grassy hillsides under a dark, tempestuous sky. As the character progresses, the camera passes a large dead monster with glowing wounds resting on the left side of the trail. The scene then transitions into a more enclosed environment where the tree canopy thickens, blocking the sky and deepening the shadows. Finally, the path winds further into the darkness as the character moves deeper into the closely spaced trees of the dense forest.
